refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly identify key analysis components (terrain, obstacles, work-zone) to ensure clarity and verifiability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map that includes terrain features, detected obstacles, and clearly marked work zones, validated against ground truth data.
sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.
DP2: Implement spatial data processing algorithms for terrain modeling and obstacle classification.
DP3: Use GIS-based work-zone representation and annotation.
DP4: Integrate data into a unified digital worksite model.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, DP3, DP4 combined to fulfill the sub-FRs with modular sensor fusion, processing, and GIS representation.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain mapping and obstacle detection algorithms.
Integration of GIS work-zone data with sensor-derived models.
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is managed via well-defined data interfaces and modular processing stages, minimizing tight interdependencies.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors in operational conditions.
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting model fidelity.
Risk of integration complexity between sensor data and GIS systems.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor sensor performance and integration complexity; consider fallback methods for degraded sensor data.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for worksite mapping/modeling including sensor data acquisition, processing, and model generation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle module.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives commands and parameters for mapping tasks from Teleoperation or higher-level planning.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts related to detected obstacles or unsafe conditions to Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Facilitates data exchange between NGHE Solution and other modules for coordination and updates.

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary owner of worksite mapping functionality; high containment, low diffusion.
Provides raw sensor data but does not process mapping; low containment, higher diffusion.
Issues tasking commands but does not implement mapping; moderate diffusion.
Receives alerts but does not perform mapping; minimal containment.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module ensures high cohesion and minimizes diffusion across modules.
containment_risks: Potential overload of NGHE Solution module with complex sensor fusion and GIS processing.
Dependency on timely and accurate data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider modular subcomponents within NGHE Solution to manage complexity; ensure robust interface contracts.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DPs logically satisfy the refined FRs with clear mapping from terrain, obstacle, and work-zone analysis to sensor fusion and GIS processing.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion as mapping functionality is centralized in NGHE Solution module.
Interfaces with Vehicle and Teleoperation are well-defined and limited.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support the assignment of mapping functionality to NGHE Solution with low diffusion risk.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module's ability to generate accurate worksite models and interface correctly with other modules.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping FRs to NGHE Solution IM with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor complexity within NGHE Solution to avoid module overload.
Validate interface robustness with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment are consistent, with manageable risks and clear verification paths. No immediate need to revise or zigzag.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

revise.why: Current level decomposition and assignments are sound and meet criteria.

open_risks: Integration complexity between sensor fusion and GIS.
evidence_needed: Sensor performance data under operational conditions.
